name: pyqtdatavisualization-qt5

metadata.name: PyQtDataVisualization-Qt5
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pyqtdatavisualization-qt5==5.15.16

documentation:
This package contains the subset of a Qt installation that is required by
PyQtDataVisualization.  It would normally be installed automatically by pip when
you install PyQtDataVisualization.

This package is licensed under the terms of the GPL v3.
